title: Thecagonum
taxonomy: Thecagonum is a genus of flowering plants in the family Apiaceae. It is a group of plants commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. Thecagonum species are native to the Mediterranean region and are known for their distinctive foliage and small white flowers. The genus Thecagonum contains a small number of species, and it is closely related to other genera within the same family. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and relationships of Thecagonum within the Apiaceae family.
